iti102:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti102:2.1: “Monks, for one knowing & seeing, I tell you, there is the ending of effluents, not for one not knowing & seeing.
iti102:2.2: For one knowing what & seeing what is there the ending of effluents?
iti102:2.3:
For one knowing & seeing,
‘This is stress,’ there is the ending of effluents.
For one knowing & seeing,
‘This is the origination of stress,’ there is the ending of effluents.
For one knowing & seeing,
‘This is the cessation of stress,’ there is the ending of effluents.
For one knowing & seeing,
‘This is the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress,’ there is the ending of effluents.
iti102:2.4: For one knowing in this way and seeing in this way is there the ending of effluents.”
iti102:3.2: along the straight path, there arises:
iti102:4.1: then, the gnosis of one released–
iti102:5.1: Certainly not by the lazy fool
